title: Fault code E0: Water flow detection fault (third time)
summary: E0 indicates water flow detection fault after third occurrence, requires power cycle to reset.
evidence_quote: E0 水流检测故障（第三次）

title: Fault code E1: Power phase sequence fault
summary: E1 indicates power phase sequence error or phase loss.
evidence_quote: E1 电源相序故障

title: Fault code E2: Communication fault
summary: E2 indicates communication fault between modules or with wired controller.
evidence_quote: E2 通讯故障 （仅主板显示）

title: Fault code E3: Total outlet water temperature sensor fault
summary: E3 indicates fault in total outlet water temperature sensor.
evidence_quote: E3 总出水温度传感器故障

title: Fault code E4: Shell-and-tube heat exchanger outlet water temperature sensor fault
summary: E4 indicates fault in unit outlet water temperature sensor.
evidence_quote: E4 壳管换热器出水温度传感器

title: Fault code E5: Condenser A tube temperature sensor fault
summary: E5 indicates fault in condenser A tube temperature sensor.
evidence_quote: E5 冷凝器A管温传感器故障

title: Fault code E6: Condenser B tube temperature sensor fault
summary: E6 indicates fault in condenser B tube temperature sensor.
evidence_quote: E6 冷凝器B管温传感器故障

title: Fault code E7: Outdoor ambient temperature sensor fault or power protection
summary: E7 indicates fault in outdoor ambient temperature sensor or power protection.
evidence_quote: E7 室外环境温度传感器故障 或电源保护

title: Fault code E9: Water flow detection fault (first/second time)
summary: E9 indicates water flow detection fault on first or second occurrence.
evidence_quote: E9 水流检测故障（第一次、第二次）

title: Fault code EA: Host detects reduction in number of slave units
summary: EA indicates slave module communication protection, displayed on wired controller.
evidence_quote: EA 主机检测到从机台数减少 （从机模块发生通讯保护，仅线控器显示）

title: Fault code Eb: Shell-and-tube heat exchanger anti-freeze temperature sensor fault
summary: Eb indicates fault in anti-freeze temperature sensor of shell-and-tube heat exchanger.
evidence_quote: Eb 壳管换热器防冻温度传感器故障

title: Fault code EC: Wired controller cannot find online module units
summary: EC indicates wired controller cannot find any online module units.
evidence_quote: EC 线控器未找到在线的模块单元 （仅线控器显示）

title: Fault code Ed: 1 hour continuous 3 times PE protection (requires power cycle)
summary: Ed indicates three consecutive PE protections within one hour, requires power cycle to reset.
evidence_quote: Ed 1小时连续 3次PE保护（需掉电恢复）

title: Fault code EF: Return water temperature sensor fault
summary: EF indicates fault in return water temperature sensor.
evidence_quote: EF 回水温度传感器故障

title: Protection code P0: System A high pressure protection or discharge temperature protection
summary: P0 indicates system A high pressure or discharge temperature protection.
evidence_quote: P0 系统A高压保护或排气温度保护

title: Protection code P1: System A low pressure protection
summary: P1 indicates system A low pressure protection.
evidence_quote: P1 系统A低压保护

title: Protection code P2: System B high pressure protection or discharge temperature protection
summary: P2 indicates system B high pressure or discharge temperature protection.
evidence_quote: P2 系统B高压保护或排气温度保护

title: Protection code P3: System B low pressure protection
summary: P3 indicates system B low pressure protection.
evidence_quote: P3 系统B低压保护

title: Protection code P4: System A current protection
summary: P4 indicates system A compressor overcurrent protection.
evidence_quote: P4 系统A电流保护

title: Protection code P5: System B current protection
summary: P5 indicates system B compressor overcurrent protection.
evidence_quote: P5 系统B电流保护

title: Protection code P6: System A condenser high temperature protection
summary: P6 indicates system A condenser high temperature protection.
evidence_quote: P6 系统A冷凝器高温保护

title: Protection code P7: System B condenser high temperature protection
summary: P7 indicates system B condenser high temperature protection.
evidence_quote: P7 系统B冷凝器高温保护

title: Protection code P8: Digital compressor discharge temperature sensor fault (reserved)
summary: P8 indicates digital compressor discharge temperature sensor fault (reserved).
evidence_quote: P8 数码压缩机排气温度传感器故障 (预留)

title: Protection code P9: Inlet/outlet water temperature difference protection
summary: P9 indicates protection for excessive temperature difference between inlet and outlet water.
evidence_quote: P9 进出水温差保护

title: Protection code Pb: System anti-freeze protection
summary: Pb indicates system anti-freeze protection.
evidence_quote: Pb 系统防冻结保护

title: Protection code PE: Shell-and-tube heat exchanger low temperature protection
summary: PE indicates shell-and-tube heat exchanger low temperature protection.
evidence_quote: PE 壳管换热器低温保护

title: Protection code PF: Function lock module in locked state
summary: PF indicates function lock module is in locked state, preventing operation.
evidence_quote: PF 功能锁定模块处于加锁状态（主板及线控器都显示此代码）

title: C series operating voltage range
summary: Supply voltage standard 380V 3N~50Hz, minimum 342V, maximum 418V.
evidence_quote: 供电电压标准为 380V 3N～50Hz，最低允许电压为 342V，最高允许电压为 418V。

title: C series 25/30/65 unit cooling operating range
summary: Cooling operating range 10°C to 46°C, heating -10°C to 21°C.
evidence_quote: 制 冷 运 行范围  制 热 运 行范围 10℃～46℃ -10℃～21℃
